sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Na Khempeuh Thei, Mun Khempeuhah Om

verses.text: Topa aw, nangmah in kei na hong entel a, nong thei khin hi
Nangmah in ka heksukna, ka hektohnate na thei hi. Nangmah in ka ngaihsutnate gamlapi pek panin na thei hi
Nangmah in ka sep laitak ahi a, ka khawl laitak ahi zongin na hong mu a, ka gamtatna khempeuh a vekpi-in na thei hi
Topa aw, kam khat bek nangawn ka paukhiat ma-in, nangmah in ka gen dingteng a vekpi-in na thei khin hi
Nangmah in ka nung leh ka mai-ah nong dal a, na thahatna tawh kei na hong hu hi
Tua bangin kei nong theihna pen kei-a' dingin lamdang lua mahmah a, thuthuk lua ahih manin kei' theihtel zawh ding hilo hi
Nangmah a pelh dingin koi-ah pai ding a, nangma omna panin koi lai-ah taikhia ding ka hi hiam
Vantungah kahto leng tua lai-ah nang na om ding a, Leinuai misite' gamah lupna bawlta leng zong tua lai-ah zong nang na om veve ding hi
Leimong pekah leengin, tuipi mong pekah omta leng zong
tua lai nangawnah nangma khut in kei hong paipihin, na khut taklam in kei hong len ding hi
“Khuamial in kei hong tuamcip hen la, ka kiima khuavak omte zan khuamial suak hen,” ci ta leng zong
tua nangawnah, nangma-a' dingin khuamial pen miallo a, zan khuamial pen sun nitaang tawh kibang hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang-a' dingin khuamial pen khuavak mah bang lel hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pumpi na khempeuh na hong piangsak a, ka nu' gil sungah keimah nong khuituah hi
Kihtak dingin a kilawm na hih manin nang ka hong phat hi. Na nasepnate lamdang mahmah! Nangmah in kei nong lim theih mahmah hi
A thukna sung mun simthamah kei hong kikhuituahin hong kibawl laitakin, ka guh ka taang, na mai-ah kiliahlo hi
A kipiangsak nailo keima pumpi nate na mit in a mu hi. Ka pumpi nate khat beek a om ma, ka ni zah ding a kiciangtan laitakin, tuate khempeuh na laibu sungah kigelh khin hi
Pasian aw, na ngaihsutnate kei-a' dingin manpha mahmah a, tuate khempeuh a vekpi-in zai mahmah hi
Tuate a mal sim leng sehnel sangin tamzaw hi. Ka khan'lawh ciangin nang tawh ka omkhawm lai hi
Pasian aw, migilote that in la, kei kiang panin mi that theite paikhia sak in
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in nang hong dem uh a, ngimna hoihlo tawh nang hong pang uh hi
Topa aw, nang hong mudah mite ke'n mudah hilo ka hi hiam? Nang' langah hong pangte ke'n kih hilo ka hi hiam
Amaute ka mudah mahmah a, amaute ka galin ka seh hi
Pasian aw, kei hong entel in la, ka lungsim hong thei in. Kei hong sit in la, ka ngaihsutnate hong thei in
Kei sungah siattheihna a omkha hiam hong en in la, tawntung lampi-ah kei hong kha in.
